GlobalConfig.Name: Test_052
GlobalConfig.Note: Project contains 2 pieces of polygonSet geometry - a rect and a saw. Both form the basis for two sprites. A keyframee_rect sprite does keyframe animation. A jitter_rect sprite does jitter animation (translation on the x axis). A morphTarge_saw sprite does morp target animation with 2 morph states. Finally a jitter_morph_saw sprite does jitter morphtarget animation. The rect sprites have filled random palette rendering with a brief pause state. The saw sprites have stroke change variation.
